ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd class) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger (Mr., Mrs., Miss, etc.) */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total family size (including the passenger) */,
  "has_family" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger has a family */,
  "is_alone" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is alone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_attributes" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "sex_female" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is female */,
  "sex_male" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is male */,
  "pclass_1" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is in 1st class */,
  "pclass_2" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is in 2nd class */,
  "pclass_3" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is in 3rd class */,
  "embarked_c" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger embarked at Cherbourg */,
  "embarked_q" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger embarked at Queenstown */,
  "embarked_s" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger embarked at Southampton */,
  "has_cabin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger has a cabin */,
  "has_family_member_died" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if any family member of the passenger died */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the embarkation port is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_survival" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger survived (1 = survived, 0 = did not survive) */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number the passenger was on, if applicable */,
  "lifeboat_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_survival_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Number of the lifeboat */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time when the lifeboat was launched */,
  "launch_location" TEXT /* Location where the lifeboat was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifeboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the crew member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the crew member */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the crew member */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the crew member survived (1 = survived, 0 = did not survive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboat_crew" (
  "lifeboat_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat crew record */,
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the lifeboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifeboat_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifeboat_crew_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifeboat_crew_lifeboat_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifeboat_id") REFERENCES lifeboats ("lifeboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_lifeboat" (
  "passenger_lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger lifeboat record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_lifeboat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_lifeboat_lifeboat_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifeboat_id") REFERENCES lifeboats ("lifeboat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_lifeboat_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
